figures.caption: Figure 1. Rendering of Male-3-casual from the People Snapshot dataset with MHR mesh on the left and SMPL-X rendering on the right.
Figure 2. Render of pose provided by Anim-NeRF (left) compared to the pose estimated with SAM-3D-Body (right).

Table 1. Quantitative comparison on the PeopleSnapshot dataset. We report PSNR↑, SSIM↑, and LPIPS↓ for novel pose synthesis. Best results are in bold, second best are underlined. All numbers listed are provided by authors.
